summary: The City seeks qualified design teams for renovating Boettcher Concert Hall, including major system replacements, interior upgrades, acoustics, seating, lighting, AV, tech, circulation, ADA improvements, and necessary exterior work. Design must also incorporate youth education spaces.

title: 2026 Emergency Wastewater Repairs
agency: City and County of Denver Department of Transportation & Infrastructure
summary: The City and County of Denver Department of Transportation & Infrastructure Wastewater Management Division requires a 3-year long contract to perform wastewater emergency repair construction work. This contract will be utilized on an as-needed basis for multiple emergency repairs. Contract term is three years and the maximum contract amount is $3,000,000.00.
requirements: Questions deadline: June 4, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. local time.

Virtual Pre-Bid Meeting on May 28, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. - Meeting Agenda (PDF, 57KB) To access the meeting, please call 720-388-6219 and enter conference ID: ­­­­304 384 006# or join via Microsoft Teams .

Prequalification: Each bidder must be prequalified in category 1A Heavy Civil at or above the $3,000,000.00 monetary level in accordance with the City’s Rules and Regulations Governing Prequalification of Contractors. Each bidder must have submitted a prequalification application a minimum of ten (10) calendar days prior to the response due date. Applications must be submitted via B2Gnow . To view the Rules and information on how to apply, please visit our website at www.denvergov.org/prequalification .
Bid documents/submittals are handled through BidNet/Rocky Mountain E-Purchasing.
